events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a grounding electrode system at rough-complete stage. Photos show installed work following referenced detail. Clearances, labels, supports, terminations in place. Inspection card has no open correction note. Reference: NEC 250.50-250.68.

This appears to be a compliant installation. Decision: pass.
